Welcome to the NFC.cool Blog

2026-03-23 · Guides

Welcome to the NFC.cool Blog

We’re excited to launch the NFC.cool Blog — a new home for everything NFC technology and digital business cards.

What You’ll Find Here

Whether you’re an NFC enthusiast, a professional looking to upgrade your networking game, or just curious about contactless technology, we’ve got you covered:

  • Practical Guides — From writing your first NFC tag to setting up the perfect digital business card
  • Honest Comparisons — We’ll compare the top digital business card apps so you can make an informed choice
  • Industry Deep Dives — How different professions are adopting digital business cards
  • Technical Insights — NFC standards, emerging tech like the EU Digital Product Passport, and more

Why We’re Doing This

After building NFC apps for millions of users since 2019, we’ve accumulated a lot of knowledge about NFC technology and the digital business card space. This blog is our way of sharing that expertise with the community.

Stay Tuned

We’ll be publishing new articles regularly, starting with a comprehensive guide to the best digital business card apps in 2026. Follow along!

© 2026 NFC.cool · Built with ❤️ in Coimbra, Portugal
